_note: Conformance fixture for the version-string formatter/parser/comparator. Format: {utc-iso8601}-{counter:06d}-{user_id}; UTC offset is +00:00 with NO trailing Z; compare lexically (== chronological). A port MUST parse all 'parse' cases (including the legacy doubled-Z, for back-compat) but MUST NOT *produce* a doubled Z.

parse.note: user_id may contain hyphens; do not split on '-' to find the timestamp
legacy doubled-Z; parse it, but never emit this form

format._note: Given a UTC timestamp + counter + user_id, produce the canonical version.

lexical_order._note: Sorting these ascending lexically must equal chronological+counter order.
